problem id: f2ec1685
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01100011 -> 10110011
  11010000 -> 10111111
  11011110 -> 00000111
  01011111 -> 01000011
  01101100 -> 01001111
  10001010 -> 01010111
  10101110 -> 11000111
  11111000 -> 00011111

query: 00010110
predicted answer: 00100111
